admission_deadlines.notes: Binding agreement for high school seniors. Decisions by December 15, $300 deposit by January 15.
Recommended deadline for high school seniors. Candidates notified by March 15, $300 deposit by May 1. Applications received after this date will be considered on a space-available basis.
Rolling basis, provided files are complete and space is available.
